description: The BuiltinType enum has multiple nested enums (BuiltinInt, BuiltinUint, BuiltinFloat) which could be flattened for simpler usage patterns.
suggested_fix: Consider flattening the nested enum structure to reduce complexity when working with built-in types.

description: The all_builtin_types() method uses rustfmt::skip but has a very long array literal that could be organized more clearly.
suggested_fix: Refactor the long array into smaller, more manageable chunks or use a different organizational pattern.

description: Multiple from_suffix methods have repetitive match patterns that could be consolidated.
suggested_fix: Consider using a macro or helper function to reduce code duplication in the from_suffix methods.

description: The ImportOrExternCrate enum has methods that return Options, suggesting it may be trying to handle too many responsibilities.
suggested_fix: Consider splitting this enum into more focused types or using composition to separate concerns.

description: The file is very large (881+ lines) indicating it may be handling too many responsibilities related to item scopes.
suggested_fix: Refactor this large file into smaller, more focused modules following single responsibility principle.

description: Heavy use of FxHashMap, FxHashSet, and other hash-based collections may benefit from more memory-efficient alternatives for certain use cases.
suggested_fix: Review collection usage and consider alternatives like index-based lookups for performance-critical paths.

description: The ImportMap struct has complex internal state management with multiple related collections that could be better encapsulated.
suggested_fix: Consider using a builder pattern or better encapsulation to manage the complex internal state.

description: The import_map_query_impl function uses tracing spans but the span is created and immediately entered without clear boundaries.
suggested_fix: Review tracing span usage to ensure proper scoping and meaningful span boundaries.

description: The import map collection process involves multiple iterations and sorting that could potentially be optimized.
suggested_fix: Review the collection and sorting logic for potential performance improvements.

description: The Display implementation for BuiltinType uses string literals that could be centralized for consistency.
suggested_fix: Consider using constants or a centralized location for type name strings to ensure consistency.

description: Heavy use of various collection types (FxHashMap, FxHashSet, SmallVec, ThinVec) suggests potential for standardization.
suggested_fix: Review collection type usage and consider standardizing on a smaller set for maintainability.

description: The ImportMap uses fst crate for efficient string matching but lacks comprehensive error handling for edge cases.
suggested_fix: Add more robust error handling for fst operations and edge cases in import resolution.
